predictions.reasoning: Regulation explicitly mandates risk management measures based on all-hazards approach to manage risks to network and information systems; directly aligns with cyber risk identification and treatment process.

Regulation requires appropriate technical, operational and organisational measures for security of network and information systems; ISMS capability governs these security policies and risk treatment measures.
Encryption and key management constitutes a technical measure for protecting network and information systems and data security, supporting the all-hazards cybersecurity risk management mandate.
